description_long: This stereo sound system consists of a wooden turntable unit with a transparent dust cover and a matching standalone speaker. The turntable features a black vinyl record on its platter, a silver tonearm, and a small control panel with buttons and a display on the front right. The speaker has a textured black grille with two circular elements and a pair of small buttons beneath the grille. The wood grain finish is prominent on both the turntable and speaker, giving the system a classic, retro aesthetic. The dust cover is made of clear plastic, providing protection while allowing visibility of the record and controls. The overall design is compact, with clean lines and a blend of modern and vintage elements.
description: A classic wood-finished stereo sound system with a turntable, transparent dust cover, and a matching speaker featuring a black grille and control panel.
description_view_0: The left side of the speaker and the top of the turntable with the dust cover open are visible, highlighting the wood grain and the transparent cover.
description_view_1: The front view shows the speaker grille, control panel, vinyl record, tonearm, and the clear dust cover, providing a full look at the interactive features.
description_view_2: The back and side of the speaker and the turntable are visible, with the dust cover open and the control panel partially visible.
description_view_3: The rear of the turntable and the side of the speaker are shown, emphasizing the wood finish and the transparent dust cover.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille has a circular mesh pattern with a central large circle and a smaller concentric circle, surrounded by a textured black surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front right of the turntable and features a small rectangular display with several buttons arranged in a row beside it.
